gummadi-usha-rani-anr-v-sure-mallikarjun.lesson: Court-appointed experts' reports must be verified — Supreme Court now polices AI-generated precedents in commissioner filings.

n-25bx02906-m-b-c-préfet-de-la-vienne-20.lesson: Verify every Conseil d'Etat citation against Legifrance before filing — French courts invite correction but publish the error.

no-25bx02906-2026-02-26.lesson: Misapplied precedent is as damaging as fabrication — read every cited case in full before relying on it.

rg-n-12442025-2026-02-20.lesson: Pull every quoted Cassazione passage from the authentic ruling — opposing counsel will produce the true text and you will pay.

n-r-c-m-s-2026-02-18.lesson: Pro-se family filer admitted AI use after challenge; non-attorney status kept sanctions to a warning.

hdo-v-mdf-2026-02-17.lesson: Pro-se AI hallucinations in Alberta appellate filings drew warnings, not sanctions — threshold remains attorney conduct.

brightwaters-energy-limited-v-eroton-exp.lesson: Prompt acknowledgement of AI error mitigated fallout — denial is what escalates English High Court sanctions.

14095863-canada-inc-v-abercrombie-fitch-.lesson: Trademark Registrar rejected a pro-se submission riddled with AI-fabricated authorities and misquoted statutes — credibility collapsed.

rinaldi-v-department-of-justice-right-to.lesson: Queensland CAT dismissed the appeal after identifying fabricated cases — pro-se filings get dismissed, not fined.

deblois-v-procureur-général-2026-02-16.lesson: Federal Court gave no weight to unretrievable citations once applicant conceded — admit fast, lose the argument only.

ac739-2026-2026-02-13.lesson: Repeating fabricated citations in the subsanation triggered a temeridad declaration and bar referral — do not double down.

ploni-v-log-on-software-ltd-et-al-2026-0.lesson: Israeli Labor Court now issues monetary sanctions for AI-fabricated case law — assume every jurisdiction is watching.

ryjz-and-commissioner-of-taxation-taxati.lesson: ART flagged fabricated AATA citations in a pro-se tax appeal — pro-se status caps sanctions at a warning.

jones-v-family-court-at-whangarei-2026-0.lesson: New Zealand Supreme Court flags real-case-name / wrong-citation pairs as AI hallucinations — verify the neutral citation, not just the name.

alamleh-c-r-2026-02-11.lesson: Pro-se criminal appellant cited a non-existent Code of Criminal Procedure — courts catch invented statutes as fast as invented cases.

morcos-v-bayside-council-2026-02-10.lesson: NSW IRC questioned the pro-se filer's candour when fabricated authorities surfaced — candour saves worse than sanctions.

n-42032025-rg-2026-02-10.lesson: Leaving a chatbot prompt inside your pleading proves uncontrolled AI use — scrub every draft before filing.

abdul-rahim-seidu-v-minister-of-citizens.lesson: Removing fake citations after the fact leaves unsupported assertions — rebuild the argument, do not just delete the footnotes.

caso-no-00001402025-00-2026-02-10.lesson: Forensic report found 48 of 52 citations AI-generated — courts will audit your entire brief when one citation fails.
